publicationStmt.p: This XML text (filename tlg2115017.xml) was generated by Diogenes (version 4.7.2) from the TLG corpus of classical texts (author number 2115, work number 017), which was once distributed on CD-ROM in a very different file format, and which may be subject to licensing restrictions.

sourceDesc.p: Hippolytus Scr. Eccl. (c. A.D. 3), Fragmentum in Ecclesiasten [Sp.] (2115: 017) "Hippolyt's kleinere exegetische und homiletische Schriften", Ed. Achelis, H. Leipzig: Hinrichs, 1897; Die griechischen christlichen Schriftsteller 1.2.

div.p: Οὐ σαρκικῶς ἐσθίειν bis τοῦ πατρός μου.
= Anastasius Sinaita, Quaestiones et responsiones. Quaestio 43 (Migne LXXXIX Col. 593 f.)
